configurePresets.name: linux-aarch64-user-base
configurePresets.description: User-specific base preset. Set AARCH64_TOOLCHAIN_PATH and ProjectVersion here once — all Linux AArch64 presets inherit from this.

configurePresets.name: linux-aarch64-debug
configurePresets.description: Cross-compile for Linux AArch64 (Debug) using ARM GNU Toolchain. AARCH64_TOOLCHAIN_PATH is read from the environment variable if set, otherwise falls back to the value defined in linux-aarch64-user-base.

configurePresets.name: linux-aarch64-release
configurePresets.description: Cross-compile for Linux AArch64 (Release) using ARM GNU Toolchain. AARCH64_TOOLCHAIN_PATH is read from the environment variable if set, otherwise falls back to the value defined in linux-aarch64-user-base.

configurePresets.name: linux-aarch64-debug-shared
configurePresets.description: Cross-compile for Linux AArch64 (Debug, Shared library). QcPerfCore is built as a shared object (.so).

configurePresets.name: linux-aarch64-release-shared
configurePresets.description: Cross-compile for Linux AArch64 (Release, Shared library). QcPerfCore is built as a shared object (.so).

buildPresets.name: linux-aarch64-debug-shared
buildPresets.description: Build QcPerfCore as a shared library (Debug)

buildPresets.name: linux-aarch64-release-shared
buildPresets.description: Build QcPerfCore as a shared library (Release)
